description: Updates an existing Resource Request within a company. Only specified properties in the request body will be updated.

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for the company. This parameter accepts both formats:
- **Recommended**: Procore company ID (integer) - Use this for new integrations
- Legacy: LaborChart UUID format (uuid string...

parameters.name: request_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the Resource Request.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Resource Request.

project_id.description: Project ID where the request is created.

job_title_id.description: Job Title UUID for this request.

work_scope_text.description: Scope of Work for the Resource Request.

schema.description: Request body schema for updating a Resource Request.

start_day.description: The first day the requested resource is needed (ISO 8601).

end_day.description: The last day the requested resource is needed (ISO 8601).

start_time.description: Start time of the request (HH:MM am/pm format).

end_time.description: End time of the request (HH:MM am/pm format).

percent_allocated.description: Allocation percentage if the request is not hour-based.

job_title_id.description: Job Title UUID for this request.

work_scope_text.description: Scope of Work for the Resource Request.

work_days.description: Object to control working days (Sunday - Saturday as 0-6 index).
